summary: Middle East conflict has halted economic momentum — Strait of Hormuz closure risks a major energy crisis. U.S. blockade of Iranian ports pushing oil prices higher. U.S. interventions in Venezuela, civil unrest in Iran, NATO presence in Greenland. IMF baseline global growth 3.1% in 2026, inflation at 4.4%; adverse scenario drops to 2.5% growth. Tariffs and critical-mineral competition continuing as geostrategic tools.
